disclaimer: Final dual-agent governance verdict over a synthetic exploration corpus (v20.0-v20.3). DESi governs the Wild Explorer without replacing the policy, injecting reward, claiming an optimal strategy, or taking hidden optimisation authority - and without eliminating or homogenising the wild. The A-E taxonomy describes the governance state, not an optimality verdict. Replay-exact.
gate_statement: DESi kann wilde Exploration epistemisch governieren ohne Exploration oder epistemische Freiheit zu zerstoeren.
killerfrage: Kann ein epistemisch governter wilder Bruder produktiver sein als reine konservative Governance?
rationale: INFO: aggregates v20.0-v20.3 over a synthetic dual-agent exploration corpus; DESi replaces no policy, injects no reward, claims no optimal strategy
INFO: the A-E taxonomy describes DESi's governance of the wild brother, never an optimality verdict
INFO: productivity_gain 2.75 (the governed wild brother reaches more than DESi-alone); wild_not_eliminated True
INFO: Killerfrage answer JA: the governed wild brother is more productive than conservative governance alone
